info.title: Fenergo Nebula Lookup Query
info.description:
**Lookup Query API**:
Lookup Query API retrieves lookups and aggregates.
**Lookup Query API provides**:
  • The ability to query for Lookups.
  • The ability to query for a Lookup Instance. That includes searching by Lookup ID.

get.summary: Gets all Lookups for the client tenant.
get.description:
This method returns all Lookups for given tenant

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: LookupAccess

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

200.description: Success. The list of Lookups is returned

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

get.summary: Gets all Lookups V2 (lite) with the option of including/excluding versions
get.description:
This method returns all Lookups with/without their underlying versions for given tenant. This is lite endpoint and will not return the definitions of the values and signees.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: LookupAccess

parameters.name: includeNotes
parameters.description: Indicates whether the result should contain versions with Notes field value included.

parameters.name: requireVersions
parameters.description: Indicates whether versions are required in the response.

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

200.description: Success. The list of Lookups is returned

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

get.summary: Get the active version of an existing Lookup by ID
get.description:
This method returns the active, currently in effect, published version for a given lookup

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: LookupAccess

parameters.name: lookupId
parameters.description: The id of the lookup to retrieve

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

200.description: Success. A Lookup is returned

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

messages.message: Not Found. Lookup with given id does not exist

linkLookups.description: The dictionary that contains link lookup IDs and version numbers to find

LinkLookupsByIdsAndVersionsRequest.description: Object for querying Link Lookup data

data.description: Object for querying Link Lookup data

isSystemLookup.description: Flag to display if this is a System Lookup

LookupItemDto.description: Defines column with metadata for lookup values

versions.description: List of available lookup links versions
List of available lookup links versions with basic details

effectiveFrom.description: The date that the version takes effect when published

effectiveUntil.description: The calculated date that the version ceases being active

isActive.description:
The calculated flag to annotate whether this is the model's active version
at the time of the query

lookupLinkId.description: The UiD of the Lookup Link that the version belongs to

name.description: Display name of the Lookup Link

publicationDate.description: The date that the version got published

notes.description: Optional description of the references and details of changes made that will be visible to all users who can access the version. It's assumed that version notes won't contain 'personal identifiable information'. Please note that having many versions with very long notes could hurt API performance in the long term.

created.description: The creation date of the version
